overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a dark cyberpunk industrial complex at night. The player follows two NPCs through narrow corridors lit by red neon and fire, emerging into an open yard with large storage tanks, eventually reaching a parking area with a futuristic vehicle.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered industrial corridor following two companions. Red neon lights illuminate the left wall while green emergency lighting marks the path ahead. The ceiling is lined with exposed ventilation ducts and metal roofing.

overhead metal walkway bridge with railings spanning the corridor

segments.scene_description: The passage narrows into a back alley illuminated by a burning oil drum on the right. The environment transitions from neon-lit to fire-lit as the player approaches an overhead metal gantry and the exit to an open area.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passage into an open industrial yard under an overcast night sky. A massive cylindrical storage tank dominates the center, surrounded by pipe racks and elevated walkways connecting the surrounding buildings.

stacked orange construction barrels near the right wall
multi-story concrete industrial building with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Entering an industrial parking area dominated by a futuristic black sedan with red lighting accents. The camera circles the vehicle, revealing its detailed custom paint job, while surrounded by industrial buildings and stacked orange barrels.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a claustrophobic industrial complex that gradually opens into a wide, dark parking area. It begins in a covered corridor where red neon and green emergency lights illuminate exposed ventilation ducts and metal roofing. As the path narrows into a back alley, the neon glow gives way to the flickering warmth of a burning oil drum beneath an overhead metal gantry. The scene then expands as the camera emerges from the passage into an open industrial yard under an overcast night sky, dominated by a massive cylindrical storage tank and a network of elevated walkways. Finally, the movement leads into a parking area where the camera circles a futuristic black sedan with red lighting accents, surrounded by industrial buildings and stacked orange barrels.
